extraction_reasoning: The litigation summary separates “By” and “Against” rows: I excluded all “By Company,” “By Directors,” “By Promoters,” and “By Group Companies” rows, and counted only the “Against” rows. Criminal proceedings against the Company, Directors and Promoters are 2 + 3 + 1 = 6; statutory/regulatory proceedings against the Company are 10, with none against Directors, Promoters or Group Companies; tax proceedings against the Company and Group Companies are 5 + 0 = 5, excluding the personal tax matters of Directors and Promoters. The litigation table’s stated aggregate claim amount against the Company is ₹2,346.42 million, while Group Companies show Nil; this is ₹234.642 crore after conversion from million using 1 crore = ₹10 million. Contingent liabilities are explicitly stated as Nil as of March 31, 2023, March 31, 2022 and March 31, 2021; I used the latest date, March 31, 2023, and the stated nil disclosure rather than summing items. No company-wide top-five or top-ten customer concentration percentage, statutory auditor opinion status, or going-concern uncertainty is disclosed in the provided risk section.
